docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERMUNDEZ, ALISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURILLO, ROMAN $2,105.33 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,190.33, DEFENDANT TO PAY $100 A MONTH BEGINNING 02/01/12 CONTINUING ON 1ST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID OFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED DEC-12-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MURILLO, ROMAN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. FILED BY BERMUNDEZ, ALISSA MURILLO, ROMAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,105.30 FILED BY BERMUNDEZ, ALISSA AS TO DEFENDANT MURILLO, ROMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
